title: 3 Baffling Scientific Anomalies

segments.text: Dark matter makes up 27% of the universe but is invisible.
And its existence is still debated by scientists.
Next, ball lightning appears without explanation during storms.
It has been seen for centuries, yet no one knows why.
Then, the Pioneer Anomaly baffled scientists for years.
Spacecraft behaved unexpectedly, leaving engineers puzzled.
And the placebo effect can sometimes heal real ailments.
Its impact is profound, yet not fully understood.
So, what other scientific mysteries are out there?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: Scientific anomalies challenge our understanding of reality. Follow for daily mysteries! 🔭
